authorCommits.message:
Dynamic filters dropdown tweaks (#4594)

Add opt-in viewport flipping for left-aligned dropdown panels so they
open leftward instead of being clipped at the right edge, and exclude
controls inside a dropdown-card from menu-item styling.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix nested menu sub-items resolving their path (#4558)

Co-authored-by: Adrian Marin <adrian@adrianthedev.com>

UI4 - give the switcher controls a resting transparent outline at the focus (#4545)

* Give the switcher controls a resting transparent outline at the focus
  width/offset so the focus-visible ring animates its color in from
  transparent instead of flashing the control's gray text color.

* Fix focus-ring color flash on pagination links

* remove transition

remove the min-w-48 from the dropdown (#4547)
